title: 悩みなんて吹き飛ばせ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our day out, Winning Ticket and I return to
the academy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Finished! That was fun, wasn't it, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Did you have a nice break?
Did you have a nice break?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I feel so refreshed! All revitalized!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I forgot about all my little worries! Though I
usually forget most things anyway!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Look—over there, in front of the gate...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Spe? Something troubling you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tickezo.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I heard that the results of the academic skill test
were up, so I came to look...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And I gotta take extra classes!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, that test we did a while back...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'll have to ask Suzuka to help me study again.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I get it! I get you, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
When you think you're finally done with studying,
extra classes come outta nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaahhh! It's so tough, right?! Like life's got it in
for you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I've got this! I'll solve your worries in one
swoop!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You will?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Just come with me! Trainer, you too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where are we going?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Here we are! The river, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh... The river, okay...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know how a river gets this big? It's 'cause lots
of little streams from the mountains come
together, bit by bit!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So if we all work together, we'll be really strong too! Isn't that the most inspiring thing ever?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay, next!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Look, Spe! It's the park!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yes, the park... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Look! There's some little Umamusume playing tag!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Maybe they're dreaming of the Derby too!
Yeaaah! Good luck, li'l ones!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay, next!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-hold on a sec!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The shrine, Spe! The scenery from here is—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, I don't mind coming to the shrine, but what is
this all about?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh? About being moved, to your very core, of
course!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Just by seeing all these different sights, you felt
all kinds of emotions, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I know you're disappointed and upset about the
extra classes, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If you look ahead, there are all these touching
things out there! They'll make your everyday
concerns fly right out of the window!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ohh, this will get rid of my concerns!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So let's experience lots of touching things, chuck
your worries out the window, and move on!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
See? If you compare your troubles to what's going
on here, don't they seem itsy-bitsy?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There are so many buildings and people... Yeah,
it is kinda making me feel like my concerns are
small!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Compared to the whole wide city, extra classes
are just a tiny speck on a peanut!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Glad to see you're feeling better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ping!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, a message?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What? No waaay! I got extra classes too?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! I'll have less time for training and less time
to have fun!
choice_data_list: It's no big deal! Just a speck on a peanut!
It's no big deal! Just a speck on a peanut!
Need to refresh yourself one more time?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! I'll have less time for training and less time
to have fun!
choice_data_list: It's no big deal! Just a speck on a peanut!
It's no big deal! Just a speck on a peanut!
Need to refresh yourself one more time?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's soooo mean! It is a big deal!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What about my "itsy-bitsy troubles"?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, extra classes are just tiny little
things, remember? We'll get through them
together!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Aaahhhh! What a dependable friend! Thanks so
much, Speee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow getting comforted by the person she
was consoling just a few moments ago, Winning
Ticket finds the determination to take extra
classes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaahhh! Thanks so muuuuch! I sure do need
iiiiit!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, um, I'll stick with you, so let's go around
looking for more inspiring things!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Speee! You're an angel!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right, full speed to emotional inspiration!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we continue our walk, visiting various inspiring
locations, until Winning Ticket starts to feel a
little better.
